name: @omadia/llm-provider
description: SDK-free runtime for the omadia LLM provider seam. Re-exports the @omadia/llm-provider-api contract and adds the runtime: model registry, provider catalog, credential resolution, the wire-format adapter registry, and resolveLlmProvider (a pure registry lookup). Contains no concrete adapter and imports no vendor SDK - the Anthropic/OpenAI adapters live in @omadia/llm-adapter-*. See docs/plans/issue-298-provider-plugins.md.
